steps.title: Identify the unifying principle
steps.content: The final sentence is the key signal: “Villasana sees both of these approaches as ways of depicting the power and interconnectedness of all people.” The main idea must capture both the diversity of her works and their unified purpose.

steps.title: Match the principle to the choices
steps.content: Choice A directly captures this: both famous and everyday people are recognized for their human strength and connection. The other three either invent unsupported details (B's chronological transition, C's scholarly reception) or misread the passage (D's within-work comparison). That matches choice A — A is correct.
